title: Neck lump

referral.text: Supports clinician recognition of recommendation-qualified persistent unexplained hoarseness, unexplained or persistent neck lump, oral ulceration lasting more than 3 weeks, lip or oral-cavity lump, red or red-and-white oral patch, and unexplained thyroid lump. It does not assert cancer or generate referral.
referral.rationale: Relevant to clinician recognition of persistent or unexplained neck and thyroid lumps with exact qualifiers, not to diagnosis.
referral.evidence_extract: Supports clinician recognition of recommendation-qualified persistent unexplained hoarseness, unexplained or persistent neck lump, oral ulceration lasting more than 3 weeks, lip or oral-cavity lump, red or red-and-white oral patch, and unexplained thyroid lump. It does not assert cancer or generate referral.

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.8.1–1.8.5 — laryngeal, oral, and thyroid cancer recognition features

follow_up.text: Supports documenting warning symptoms, when to return for re-evaluation, agreed review, and patient-initiated review if symptoms recur, persist, worsen, or cause concern.
follow_up.rationale: Relevant to documenting review and safety net for unexplained symptoms without generating an interval or pathway.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Supports documenting warning symptoms, when to return for re-evaluation, agreed review, and patient-initiated review if symptoms recur, persist, worsen, or cause concern.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Site, size, duration, progression, tenderness, mobility, thyroid features, infection, systemic symptoms, age and examination are absent.
No cause, cancer, imaging, test, biopsy, referral or urgency is inferred.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
